reviews.review_description:
This app is insane.  Above and beyond what you’d expect from a sports streaming app.   

Seriously, incredible. 

BATTER UP! 

Put me at the plate and let me play.  Instead of a simulated game on field, would love a home run derby game while I watch my favorite team play on the big screen.  

Co-view

Let me play catch with my friends while we watch the game. Let me pitch the ball to my batter friend.

I mean, you’ve done all this (what currently exists) imagine, having an app that helps young players develop skills and while enjoying watching MLB.  

Bravo on this app.  Make it better.

Game, would it let me load my password or my username 
￼

reviews.review_title: Awesome way to watch games, not perfect.
reviews.review_description:
2026 update:

The good:
2026 spring training games now work and as of so far, live games seem to be working great too. It also seems the ball trail is fixed too. Thank you to the developers  for fixing that! 

The bad:
There's now this weird shadow and i'd rather just not have the shadow. i'd rather just enjoy the games as is and to be able to have the freedom of seeing the entire baseball field instead of just the strike zone area, when I choose to see from the strike zone point of view. 
(This isn't a crucial breaking point which is why my review is still four stars but it's still upsetting. If it's important to have the weird shadow thing, then make it a toggle in settings)

Would be cool if:
The android XR (samsung) version of the app has full 3-D player models while quest just has a little dots. It’ still cool, don’t get me wrong, but it’s just kind of unfortunate that android XR is getting bigger and better updates even though the player base is probably mainly on quest. 

PLEASE ADD 3D PLAYER MODELS TO QUEST VERSION!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We have resolved the loading issue, and Gameday mode is now available. Please be aware, tracking data may be unreliable or out of sync during Spring Training games.

reviews.review_description:
This app begins to fulfill an old fantasy of viewing live games in 3D, and it's a nice start. I've been telling any baseball fans I know about this app.

Big Deficit #1: So far, for 2026, no views of the 3D game light the outfield. The nearly useless Theatre View glitches to black 95% of the time, but even when lit up, there are no players, and it looks like a view from hundreds of feet up. The one view I can move around in, and it's broken, slow and unwieldy.

Big Deficit #2: I want to be able to joystick around the field. Two Quest joysticks, and they do nothing useful. I want to be able walk around the field. And all that work putting together the stadiums in 3D, I want to explore.

reviews.review_title: Where did the ball trails go?
reviews.review_description:
Please fix.

Edit: It’s been another week since I wrote this review and the ball trails are still not showing up? Wtf?

Almost noticed a lot of errors with multiple copies of the same player or the wrong player icon or number displayed in the field. This has really great potential to be an amazing experience but I’m consistently disappointed with the shortcomings. It should not take this long to fix a simple issue with this much visibility

developer_response.body: Thank you for raising these issues! The missing ball trails have been resolved and ball trails will now appear properly in games going forward. We are improving player recognition and assignment on the field and you should see those issues resolved in future updates.

reviews.review_title: Ball trails seem to be gone?
reviews.review_description: Very enjoyable to watch along with the radio feed especially if you are in a blackout region, but recently for some reason the baseball on the virtual field is now invisible so you can't really see the play unfold.  Otherwise would be 5 star for me

developer_response.body: Thank you for raising this issue! The missing ball trails have been resolved and ball trails will now appear properly in games going forward.

reviews.review_description: Trying to watch baseball but there isn’t any ball trails please fix. Otherwise its a good app to watch baseball

developer_response.body: Thank you for raising this issue! The missing ball trails have been resolved and ball trails will now appear properly in games going forward.

reviews.review_description: It would be cool if I could sit in the stadium and watch the game that way. Maybe one day?

developer_response.body: Hi, Bobcat. Thank you for raising this issue! The missing ball trails have been resolved and ball trails will now appear properly in games going forward.

So many low reviews for this "game". It's not a game. It's a great way to watch games. It's not just highlights, you can watch full games with 3d elements like pitch placement, hit launch angles and more.

All you do is you just login for creating an account which is not fun to me but all you do is pick your favorite team and then you just watch the real like highlights end it shows what they want it’s just really boring so I pick only zero stars
When you get in all you do is just hit the ball and then you have to  create an account which is a pain in the neck overall this game is just horrible.

An FYI to all. This is NOT a game you play. A lot of reviews out there saying “can not even play the game!” It’s not a game. This is MLB.TV on VR headset. Just as of you were watching on TV or phone/tablet. There’s no special seating like in the dug out or stands or on field. It’s the normal tv broadcast of the game. It’s the normal teams broadcast so like Bally Sports or whatever your teams local broadcast is. It’s like watching on a big screen tv. Not in VR or 360° videos. I enjoy the app bc it does show the pitch locations and speed/pitch type. Shows the players stats. Just wish it was more 4K video rather than standard video.
The only reason I got this game is to play baseball but all you do is stare off into the distance if you are seeing this please trust me and do not get it it’s a 0/9999999

Great concept, the content is garbage. There is only audio on the videos while you stare at white screen. 
👎👎😢

None of the live games play. Watching live games was the point of downloading this app. When I first downloaded it, I was able to watch the games on replay, but even that doesn't work anymore. Please fix the app!
It’s great

Being a VR developer myself and a baseball fan and softball coach, I had to try this app. And I bought the postseason pack to watch games live as well. And I'm impressed. I love the big screen video and the views of homeplate or the field as a whole.

Yes, of course there are opportunities for improvement, like the ones already mentioned, I also find myself clicking on the pitcher and hitter in the play-by-play section regularly to get more info and since the info is available if I click on them in the full field view, it should be fairly easy to show that info in the overall view. There's room to the left of the panel to display this without having to hide the video feed and the other overall info.

Another quick win would be if I can replay the games without knowing the result. I probably won't be able to watch the World Series live as they are in the middle of the night here in Europe, so I would love the replay the game the day after. Would be good to have a setting in the profile if you want to see the result or not.

If you need more help with ideas or development let me know :-)

reviews.review_title: Has a lot of potential... keep going!
reviews.review_description:
The overall ballgame viewing layout is solid and has the potential to really make for an immersive game watching experience that goes beyond just sitting in front of a tv, or even being at the game. Having all of the key elements of the “at bat” app easily viewable at the same time is fantastic, and the 3D field below is a great concept to keep the OF and on base players in sight. I just wish it went deeper at every level of information. In my limited first day of use, here’s my takeaway:

The 3D field would be more than just a novelty if some more info was incorporated in. 
  - visible Image, Name, and number of every player on the OF. 
  - Ability to click on the players images and get detailed stats. 
  - OF shifts should be reflected in their position on the field. 
  - It would help tremendously with the immersion to mock up somewhat accurate representations of the ballparks to give a feeling like you’re really looking down into the ballpark. 
  - If all those elements were incorporated, the ability to adjust camera height as well as rotation would be the icing on the cake for a truly amazing little field under the video screen. 

It would also be fantastic if all the players names and photos could be clicked on to bring up more stats and info. It’s always helpful when you want to skinny on a player you don’t know much about, or are curious what a batter’s avg is on southpaws when a reliever gets brought up in the 8th inning. 

And finally, the ability to simulcast multiple games and scores. I loved the old mlb desktop where you could stream 4 games at once. It would be great to be able to bring up at least one or two more, as well as the ability to have all in-play game box scores up somewhere. 

A great start, but I hope MLB’s developers have the chance to continue updating. It would be fantastic to really live up to the potential of the VR space that has been created!

You need to have a MLB.tv login and subscription to use this app.
